mapper.insert: INSERT INTO public_data_import_runs ( status, target_months, target_regions, dry_run, fetched_count, staged_count, geocoded_count, failed_count, started_at, failure_reason ) VALUES ( #{status}, #{targetMonths}, #{targetRegions}, #{dryRun}, #{fetchedCount}, #{stagedCount}, #{geocodedCount}, #{failedCount}, #{startedAt}, #{failureReason} )
mapper.update: UPDATE public_data_import_runs SET status = #{status}, fetched_count = #{fetchedCount}, staged_count = #{stagedCount}, geocoded_count = #{geocodedCount}, failed_count = #{failedCount}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, failure_reason = #{failureReason} WHERE import_run_id = #{importRunId}

UPDATE public_data_import_runs SET status = #{status}, fetched_count = #{fetchedCount}, staged_count = #{stagedCount}, geocoded_count = #{geocodedCount}, failed_count = #{failedCount}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, failure_reason = #{failureReason} WHERE import_run_id = #{importRunId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO public_data_import_errors ( import_run_id, lawd_cd, deal_ymd, api_type, error_code, message ) VALUES ( #{importRunId}, #{lawdCd}, #{dealYmd}, #{apiType}, #{errorCode}, #{message} )

INSERT INTO public_data_raw_apartment_transactions ( import_run_id, source_key, property_type, transaction_type, lawd_cd, sido, sigungu, legal_dong, jibun, address_key, full_address, apartment_name, exclusive_area_m2, floor, built_year, deal_date, deal_amount_krw, deposit_amount_krw, monthly_rent_krw, geocoding_status, canonical_status ) VALUES ( #{importRunId}, #{sourceKey}, #{propertyType}, #{transactionType}, #{lawdCd}, #{sido}, #{sigungu}, #{legalDong}, #{jibun}, #{addressKey}, #{fullAddress}, #{apartmentName}, #{exclusiveAreaM2}, #{floor}, #{builtYear}, #{dealDate}, #{dealAmountKrw}, #{depositAmountKrw}, #{monthlyRentKrw}, #{geocodingStatus}, CASE WHEN #{geocodingStatus} = 'SUCCESS' THEN 'ELIGIBLE' ELSE 'SKIPPED' END ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE import_run_id = VALUES(import_run_id), geocoding_status = VALUES(geocoding_status), canonical_status = CASE WHEN VALUES(geocoding_status) = 'SUCCESS' THEN 'ELIGIBLE' ELSE 'SKIPPED' END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)
mapper.select: SELECT address_key AS addressKey, full_address AS fullAddress, status, latitude, longitude, failure_reason AS failureReason FROM public_data_geocoding_cache WHERE address_key = #{addressKey}
mapper.update: UPDATE public_data_raw_apartment_transactions SET geocoding_status = #{geocodingStatus}, canonical_status = CASE WHEN #{geocodingStatus} = 'SUCCESS' THEN 'ELIGIBLE' ELSE 'SKIPPED' END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE source_key = #{sourceKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO public_data_geocoding_cache ( address_key, full_address, status, latitude, longitude, failure_reason ) VALUES ( #{addressKey}, #{fullAddress}, #{status}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{failureReason} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE full_address = VALUES(full_address), status = VALUES(status), latitude = VALUES(latitude), longitude = VALUES(longitude), failure_reason = VALUES(failure_reason), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)

INSERT INTO properties ( property_type, name, sido, sigungu, legal_dong, road_address, jibun_address, latitude, longitude, built_year, household_count, source_system ) VALUES ( #{propertyType}, #{name}, #{sido}, #{sigungu}, #{legalDong}, NULL, #{jibunAddress}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{builtYear}, NULL, #{sourceSystem} )
mapper.select: SELECT transaction_id FROM property_transactions WHERE source_system = 'PUBLIC_DATA_PORTAL' AND source_transaction_id = #{sourceKey} ORDER BY transaction_id ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO property_transactions ( property_id, transaction_type, exclusive_area_m2, floor, deal_amount_krw, deposit_amount_krw, monthly_rent_krw, deal_date, source_system, source_transaction_id ) SELECT #{propertyId}, #{transactionType}, #{exclusiveAreaM2}, #{floor}, #{dealAmountKrw}, #{depositAmountKrw}, #{monthlyRentKrw}, #{dealDate}, #{sourceSystem}, #{sourceTransactionId} WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM property_transactions WHERE source_system = #{sourceSystem} AND source_transaction_id = #{sourceTransactionId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE public_data_raw_apartment_transactions SET canonical_status = 'APPLIED', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE raw_transaction_id = #{rawTransactionId}
UPDATE public_data_raw_apartment_transactions SET canonical_status = 'SKIPPED', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE raw_transaction_id = #{rawTransactionId}
UPDATE public_data_raw_apartment_transactions SET canonical_status = 'FAILED', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE raw_transaction_id = #{rawTransactionId}
